outfits.name: Asteroid jumpdrive conversion
outfits.description: Through means unknown to you, this outfit adds a custom and mysterious mounting point for some equally mysterious equipment.

outfits.name: Asteroid mount conversion
outfits.description: Through means unknown to you, this outfit adds a custom and mysterious mounting point for some equally mysterious equipment.

outfits.name: Asteroid antimissle conversion
outfits.description: Through means unknown to you, this outfit adds a custom and mysterious mounting point for some equally mysterious equipment.

outfits.name: Asteroid large mount conversion
outfits.description: Through means unknown to you, this outfit adds a custom and mysterious mounting point for some equally mysterious equipment.

outfits.name: Heavy Outfit (Gun)
outfits.description: Adds capacity for very large outfits by extracing and replacing a gun port. Due to most ships not being designed around the removal of gun ports, it causeses immense heating issues due to a lack of previousy availible ventilation.

outfits.name: Heavy Outfit (Turret)
outfits.description: Adds capacity for very large outfits by extracing and replacing a turret mount. Due to most ships not being designed around the removal of turret mounts, it causeses immense heating issues due to a lack of previousy availible ventilation.

outfits.name: Heavy Outfit Expansion
outfits.description: Adds capacity for very large outfits. In doing so however, it occupies a lot of open space in your ships hull, causing heating issues to occur.

outfits.name: Utility Heavy Outfit
outfits.description: Adds capacity for very large outfits. In doing so however, it occupies a lot of open space in your ships engine and weaponry compartments, causing heating issues to occur. It also decreases energy efficiency due to having to extend and re-route so many of the ships electrical components away from previously wiring destinations.

outfits.name: Compact Heavy Outfit
outfits.description: A highly compact and efficient heavy outfit space expansion.

outfits.name: Spinalmount Modification
outfits.description: Through rigorous efforts and heavy ship modification, this outfit can add an additional mount for extremely heavy equipment onto almost any ship. Due to the processes and methods involved in installation, it results in a tremendous amount of weight and cooling issues being introduced due to the severe modifications and size required in order to install it.

outfits.name: Turret-to-Outfit Conversion
outfits.description: Swaps a turret mount for outfit space.

outfits.name: Gunport-to-Outfit Conversion
outfits.description: Swaps a gun port for outfit space.

outfits.name: Cargo Conversion
outfits.description: Swaps outfit space for cargo space.

outfits.name: Cargo-Bunk Conversion
outfits.description: Swaps a single bunk for cargo space.

outfits.name: Cargo-Bunk Conversion XL
outfits.description: Swaps a single bunk for cargo space.
